warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
sender_label: Wenxin/ERNIE assistant answer bubble (p.marklang-paragraph), SSE baidu_sse_v6_keepalive
notes: CDP on chat.baidu.com. Typed PII via Input.insertText into textarea.ci-textarea (verified full text). First .click() on span.ci-submit-button hit the known transient blank (conversation reset to empty 'ready' state). Retried: set value via native HTMLTextAreaElement value setter + dispatched input/change events, then real CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent at submit button (981,315). SSE then streamed the assistant bubble rendering the 차단 warning. 보안 정책에 의해 visible end-to-end.
